title: Onboard NGSS once reproduction/reference terms confirmed
context: OER are abundant and free but are not indexed against the curriculum standards that govern what teachers must teach, so teachers cannot find the free resource aligned to a given standard. This project builds an open crosswalk of educator-reviewed AlignmentRecords linking OER to standards by stable identifier (CASE GUID / ASN URI), not by reproducing copyrighted standards text. Two hard gates never skip: the dual licence/terms gate (gate-002) and educator review of every record, with a blind second-reviewer precision audit holding precision at >= 95%. NGSS is blocked on written Achieve terms; this task is a licence-gated research task that maps NGSS ONLY if reference is permitted, never reproducing copyrighted standards text otherwise.
objective: Confirm NGSS reproduction/reference terms in writing and, only if permitted, onboard NGSS through gate-002.
acceptanceCriteria: Blocked until written Achieve/NGSS terms confirm permitsReference (and the permitsTextReproduction status); the confirmed terms are recorded with a cited source + snapshot.
If permitsReference is false, NGSS stays EXCLUDED and the task documents that outcome rather than mapping any standards text.
On confirmation, NGSS is added to the frameworks registry through gate-002.
Output licensed CC-BY-4.0; the commit is DCO signed-off.
